Black Friday Cascade.title: The Black Friday Cascade
Black Friday Cascade.context: It is 12:01 AM on Black Friday. The global checkout service is experiencing 40% error rates. A recent deployment to the payment gateway created a race condition that is poisoning the distributed cache. Public sentiment is plummeting on X (Twitter), the JP market is trending #BoycottYourBrand, and the CEO is demanding a real-time status update every 15 minutes while major retailers are threatening to pull their integrations.

Satellite De-orbit Crisis.title: Orbital Decay Crisis
Satellite De-orbit Crisis.context: A critical telemetry bug has caused a fleet of 12 communications satellites to enter a decay orbit. They will re-enter the atmosphere in 48 hours. The government is demanding an immediate fix, but the only available patch requires a reboot that will kill all current global signals for 30 minutes.

Global Finance Flash-Crash.title: Algorithmic Flash-Crash
Global Finance Flash-Crash.context: An algorithmic trading bot has entered a recursive loop, selling off a major currency at millisecond speeds. Global markets are crashing. The Central Bank wants to freeze all trading, but doing so would cause a worldwide liquidity panic. $2.4B has been lost in 7 minutes.
